title: キミのアクセサリパーツ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing, I come across
some people looking immensely excited.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No way! There's going to be a Dee pop-up?! I
thought he only sold online!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Apparently, he also has pop-ups every now
and again. I heard there'd be one around here!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Fuji! You haven't seen any stalls selling
accessories around here, have you?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you mean the Dee pop-up? I was actually just
on my way over there!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Dee is a popular accessory designer. Legend has
it he once sold out a new release in just one
minute.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Save the explanations for later! Let's move!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No way, it's really here! I chose the perfect time
to check the website!
choice_data_list: Do you buy from him often?
Do you buy from him often?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I guess so. His accessories have to grow on you a
bit, but once he gets his hooks in you, that's it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That chain earring is one of his, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How do you know that?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy dressing in a variety of styles, so I'm
always checking out different tastes.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No kidding...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, he's selling the ear cuffs!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, those are the ones people say sold out in a
minute! The silver rings next to them are also very
rare!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...!
So, do you know what those are right next to
them?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. That's the limited-edition anti-eyebrow and
eyebrow set! That's the—
choice_data_list: Oh, that's the eyebrow piercing you have!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This takes me back. I went and got the piercing
done professionally the very day it arrived.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I still haven't got an anti-eyebrow piercing done
yet, but I'm definitely going to one day!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, there are even some items for sale today
only! And the design!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me! It matches that necklace he used to
sell, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...!
It does, right?! I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you knew that. You must be a
hardcore fan!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I'm honored by the compliment! But I just
happen to have one, so it just clicked.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You might actually be able to pull it off as well.
It's limited edition, so this might be your only
chance to get your hands on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is in a good mood from start to finish,
and Fuji Kiseki and I have a good time shopping
with her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I bought more than I expected!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I might've gotten a little carried away, actually. I
spent a lot, but...
choice_data_list:
It's good that you were able to buy what you
wanted!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess. It was a necessary expense, so no
regrets.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you consider the effect that having these will
have on my performance...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It was a freakin' bargain, if anything.
choice_data_list: Which one are you gonna wear first?
Which one are you gonna wear first?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It was a freakin' bargain, if anything.
choice_data_list: Which one are you gonna wear first?
Which one are you gonna wear first?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hearing you say it makes it sound less
convincing...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Meh... I guess it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shopping with Air Shakur has turned out to be an
extremely valuable experience!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Does it matter? And why do I have to tell you
anyway?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's the only answer I get out of her, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Air Shakur trying out each of her new
accessories over the next few days and looking
pleased.
